enrichment.short_description: Apollo.io is a sales intelligence platform combining B2B contact data, multichannel outreach automation, and deal execution tools.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Apollo.io: B2B sales platform with 230M+ contacts, AI multichannel outreach, and deal execution tools for sales teams.

features.title: Outbound prospecting
features.description: AI-powered multichannel campaigns with email deliverability safeguards.

features.title: Inbound lead management
features.description: Anonymous visitor identification, real-time form enrichment, and automated lead routing.

features.title: Data enrichment
features.description: Access to 230M+ contacts and 30M+ company profiles with verified contact information.

features.title: Deal execution
features.description: Pre-meeting insights, AI call summaries, pipeline boards, and conversation intelligence.

features.title: Workflow automation
features.description: Custom automation sequences and task prioritization for sales teams.

features.title: CRM integrations
features.description: Syncs with Salesforce, HubSpot, and other CRM platforms.

pros: Large B2B contact database (230M+ contacts, 30M+ companies)
Combines prospecting, engagement, and CRM sync in one platform
Free-forever Starter plan available after the trial
Multiple compliance certifications (SOC 2, GDPR, ISO/IEC 27001, CCPA)
cons: Exact paid plan names and prices are not published on the pricing page
Enrichment and mobile data draw from a credits system that adds complexity
No native iOS/Android app mentioned, only a Chrome extension

faqs.question: Does Apollo.io have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Apollo offers a free-forever Starter plan once the trial expires.

faqs.question: What CRMs does Apollo integrate with?
faqs.answer: Salesforce, HubSpot, Outreach, SalesLoft, and other platforms.

faqs.question: How large is Apollo's contact database?
faqs.answer: Over 230 million contacts and 30 million company profiles.

faqs.question: Is Apollo.io compliant with data regulations?
faqs.answer: Yes, it holds GDPR, SOC 2, CCPA, ISO/IEC 27001, and other certifications.

use_cases.title: Outbound prospecting
use_cases.description: Run AI-powered multichannel campaigns from a single database of verified contacts.

use_cases.title: Inbound lead routing
use_cases.description: Identify anonymous website visitors and automatically route qualified leads.

use_cases.title: Deal management
use_cases.description: Track pipeline with AI call summaries and conversation intelligence.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Apollo.io?
paragraphs: Apollo.io is a sales platform that combines a B2B contact database of 230M+ people and 30M+ companies with multichannel outreach automation and deal execution tools.
It covers the full sales motion in one workspace: finding and enriching prospects, running email/call/LinkedIn sequences, and tracking deals with AI-assisted call summaries and pipeline boards.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Apollo.io is for
paragraphs: Apollo.io serves sales leaders, account executives, SDRs, revenue operations professionals, marketers, and founders who need prospect data and outreach automation in a single tool rather than stitching together separate point solutions.

enrichment.short_description: Instantly is a sales engagement platform for cold email outreach, a large lead database, and AI agents that automate prospecting and replies.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Instantly is a cold email and lead intelligence platform with AI sales agents, a 450M+ lead database, and multichannel outreach automation.

features.title: AI Sales Agent & AI Reply Agent
features.description: AI tools that automate outbound sending and reply handling.

features.title: Lead Database
features.description: Access to a 450M+ B2B lead database with email verification.

features.title: Website Visitors
features.description: Tracks and identifies visitors to your website.

features.title: Outreach & CRM
features.description: Campaign management with a built-in CRM for tracking deals.

features.title: Email Accounts & AirMail infrastructure
features.description: Sending infrastructure built for email deliverability.

features.title: Automations
features.description: AI workflows that trigger actions based on lead behavior.

pros: Large B2B lead database (450M+ contacts) included in bundle plans
Includes AI agents for both sending outreach and handling replies
Plan tiers scale from solo founders up to agencies
No credit card required to start a trial
cons: No always-free plan; every published tier is a paid subscription
Overlapping plan structures (Bundle, Outreach-only, Credits) can be confusing to compare
Higher tiers (Agency, Hypergrowth) are priced for larger teams, not solo users

faqs.question: Does Instantly have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, but it offers a trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What's the cheapest Instantly plan?
faqs.answer: The Growth outreach-only plan starts at $47/month.

faqs.question: Does Instantly offer annual billing discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes, plans are discounted roughly 10% when billed yearly.

faqs.question: What languages does Instantly support?
faqs.answer: English, German, and Italian.

use_cases.title: Cold email outreach
use_cases.description: Run automated cold email campaigns with built-in deliverability tools.

use_cases.title: Lead sourcing
use_cases.description: Pull prospects directly from the 450M+ B2B lead database.

use_cases.title: Reply automation
use_cases.description: Let the AI Reply Agent triage and respond to inbound replies.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Instantly?
paragraphs: Instantly is a sales engagement platform for cold email outreach, built around a large B2B lead database, sending infrastructure, and AI agents that handle both outbound sends and inbound replies.
It bundles lead access, email account management, and CRM-style deal tracking so outreach and follow-up can run from one workspace.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Instantly is for
paragraphs: Instantly is built for sales teams, agencies, freelancers, founders, and enterprise teams running high-volume cold email campaigns who need lead data and AI-assisted automation without separate tools.

enrichment.short_description: lemlist is a multichannel outbound platform with a 650M+ lead database and AI-assisted email, LinkedIn, call, WhatsApp, and SMS outreach.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: lemlist is an AI outbound platform for multichannel sales outreach across email, LinkedIn, calls, WhatsApp, and SMS with built-in lead data.

features.title: Lead finding & enrichment
features.description: 650M+ lead database with an email finder, verifier, and phone number finder.

features.title: Multichannel outreach
features.description: Run campaigns across email, LinkedIn, calls, WhatsApp, and SMS from one workflow.

features.title: AI-powered tools
features.description: lemAgent, intent signal agents, and smart messaging personalization.

features.title: Unified inbox
features.description: Manage conversations across all outreach channels in one place.

features.title: Deliverability tools
features.description: Monitoring and alerts to help keep emails out of spam folders.

pros: Combines lead sourcing, enrichment, and multichannel outreach in one product
SOC 2 certified and GDPR compliant
500+ integrations including Salesforce, HubSpot, and Attio
Supports four UI languages (English, French, German, Spanish)
cons: No permanent free plan, only a 14-day free trial
LinkedIn, SMS, and WhatsApp automation require the pricier Multichannel plan
Extra lead data (verification, phone numbers, intent signals) is billed separately via credits

faqs.question: Does lemlist have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, but it offers a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What's included in the Multichannel plan?
faqs.answer: LinkedIn, SMS, and WhatsApp automation plus a call dialer, on top of all Email plan features.

faqs.question: What languages does lemlist support?
faqs.answer: English, French, German, and Spanish.

faqs.question: Does lemlist integrate with CRMs?
faqs.answer: Yes, including Salesforce, HubSpot, and Attio.

use_cases.title: Multichannel prospecting
use_cases.description: Combine email, LinkedIn, and calls in a single sequence.

use_cases.title: Lead sourcing
use_cases.description: Pull and enrich leads directly from the 650M+ database.

use_cases.title: Agency account management
use_cases.description: Use custom roles and a dedicated account manager on Enterprise.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is lemlist?
paragraphs: lemlist is a multichannel outbound platform that pairs a 650M+ lead database with AI-assisted personalization across email, LinkedIn, calls, WhatsApp, and SMS.
A unified inbox and deliverability monitoring tools let teams manage replies and protect sender reputation from the same workspace.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who lemlist is for
paragraphs: lemlist is aimed at sales reps, SDRs, sales leaders, revenue operations teams, founders, and agencies who want lead sourcing and multichannel outreach combined in one platform.

enrichment.short_description: Smartlead is a cold email platform with AI agents, dedicated sending infrastructure, and a lead finder built to improve inbox deliverability.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Smartlead is a cold email platform with AI sales agents, dedicated sending infrastructure, and lead verification for 100,000+ businesses.

features.title: SmartAssistant
features.description: AI assistant for setting up and optimizing cold email campaigns.

features.title: SmartProspect
features.description: Lead finder delivering verified leads for cold outbound.

features.title: SmartAgents
features.description: AI-powered go-to-market automation.

features.title: SmartInfra
features.description: Dedicated servers for controlling email deliverability.

features.title: Unified Master Inbox
features.description: Centralized dashboard for managing all campaign replies.

features.title: Email verification & warmup
features.description: Automated domain authentication and sender reputation building.

features.title: Integrated CRM
features.description: Kanban-style deal tracking synced with outreach activity.

pros: Available as web, iOS, and Android apps
Integrates with HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Clay, Zapier, Make, and n8n
Dedicated sending infrastructure (SmartInfra) for deliverability control
Used by 100,000+ businesses per the site
cons: No permanent free plan, only a free trial
Add-ons (SmartServers, SmartDelivery, SmartDialer) are billed separately from core plans
Company is a small legal entity (521 Products Pty Ltd) rather than a large established vendor

faqs.question: Does Smartlead have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, it offers a free trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Where is Smartlead based?
faqs.answer: Sydney, Australia, operated by 521 Products Pty Ltd.

faqs.question: What CRMs does Smartlead integrate with?
faqs.answer: HubSpot, Salesforce, and Pipedrive, among others.

faqs.question: Is there a mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes, Smartlead offers iOS and Android apps.

use_cases.title: Cold email at scale
use_cases.description: Use dedicated infrastructure to control deliverability for high-volume sending.

use_cases.title: Lead sourcing
use_cases.description: Find verified leads with SmartProspect.

use_cases.title: Reply management
use_cases.description: Track replies and deals via the Unified Master Inbox and CRM.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Smartlead?
paragraphs: Smartlead is a cold email outreach platform built around dedicated sending infrastructure, a verified lead finder, and AI agents that assist with campaign setup and go-to-market automation.
A unified inbox and integrated CRM let teams manage replies and deals alongside their outbound sending, and the platform is available on web, iOS, and Android.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Smartlead is for
paragraphs: Smartlead targets agencies and businesses running high-volume cold email programs who need control over sending infrastructure and deliverability, from smaller teams up to larger companies.

name: Reply.io
skip_reason: Official site (reply.io) blocks automated fetching — repeated attempts against the homepage and pricing page returned HTTP 403 Forbidden or connection refused, so no facts could be verified directly from the source.

enrichment.short_description: Woodpecker.co is a cold email and LinkedIn outreach tool with usage-based pricing, lead finding, and deliverability monitoring.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Woodpecker.co is a cold email and LinkedIn outreach tool with usage-based pricing, lead finding, and deliverability monitoring for B2B teams.

features.title: Cold email campaigns
features.description: Create and automate cold email sequences.

features.title: LinkedIn outreach
features.description: Automated profile visits, connection requests, DMs, and InMails.

features.title: Lead finding
features.description: Sources prospects from a database of over 1 billion contacts.

features.title: Email verification & warm-up
features.description: Free email verification and warm-up included on all tiers.

features.title: Deliverability monitoring
features.description: Adaptive sending and domain audits to protect sender reputation.

features.title: Inbox rotation
features.description: Centralized inbox management across connected accounts.

pros: Usage-based pricing (pay per contacted prospect) instead of flat per-seat fees
Unlimited team members and email accounts included on all tiers
Founded in 2015, headquartered in Wrocław, Poland
Free email verification and initial warm-ups included
cons: LinkedIn outreach is a paid add-on ($29/month per account), not included by default
Extra charges apply for lead finder credits, additional warm-ups, and integrations/API access
No stated iOS, Android, Mac, or Windows apps

faqs.question: Does Woodpecker have a free plan?
faqs.answer: It has a $0 usage tier plus a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How is Woodpecker priced?
faqs.answer: Based on contacted prospects, starting at $7 per 100 prospects/month.

faqs.question: Is LinkedIn outreach included?
faqs.answer: No, it's a $29/month per-account add-on.

faqs.question: Where is Woodpecker based?
faqs.answer: Wrocław, Poland, founded in 2015.

use_cases.title: Cold email + LinkedIn sequencing
use_cases.description: Combine email and LinkedIn touches in one campaign.

use_cases.title: Usage-based outreach
use_cases.description: Pay only for prospects actually contacted.

use_cases.title: Deliverability monitoring
use_cases.description: Run domain audits and adaptive sending to protect reputation.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Woodpecker?
paragraphs: Woodpecker.co is a cold email and LinkedIn outreach tool that lets teams find prospects, verify addresses, and run combined email and LinkedIn sequences with deliverability monitoring built in.
Pricing is usage-based, charging per contacted prospect rather than a flat per-seat fee, with unlimited team members and email accounts included.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Woodpecker is for
paragraphs: Woodpecker is built for sales teams, lead generation agencies, recruiters, and business owners running B2B outbound prospecting who want pay-per-use pricing instead of flat subscriptions.

enrichment.short_description: Saleshandy is an all-in-one cold outreach platform for lead discovery, email automation, and multichannel sales sequences.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Saleshandy combines an 852M+ contact database, email deliverability tools, and multichannel outreach sequences for sales teams.

features.title: B2B lead database
features.description: 852M+ verified contacts across 42M+ companies with buying signals.

features.title: Email infrastructure
features.description: Auto-configured SPF, DKIM, and DMARC setup in under 10 minutes.

features.title: Multichannel sequences
features.description: Email, calls, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and custom tasks in a single sequence.

features.title: Deliverability suite
features.description: Automatic warmup, domain health checks, and inbox placement testing.

features.title: Unified inbox
features.description: Centralized reply management across accounts with a built-in CRM.

features.title: AI Sequence Copilot
features.description: Automated copywriting and follow-up suggestions.

pros: Large B2B contact database (852M+ contacts, 42M+ companies)
SOC 2, ISO 27001, and GDPR compliant
Multiple add-on tools (dialer, inbox placement tests, CRM) available within the platform
Claims a 99.4% deliverability rate
cons: No permanent free plan, only a 7-day free trial
Core plans and add-ons (dialer, verification, CRM) are billed separately, adding complexity
Top-tier Outreach Scale Plus plan is priced for larger agencies, not solo users

faqs.question: Does Saleshandy have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, but it offers a 7-day free trial and up to 50 free lead credits.

faqs.question: What's the cheapest Saleshandy plan?
faqs.answer: Outreach Starter starts at $25/month billed annually.

faqs.question: How large is Saleshandy's contact database?
faqs.answer: Over 852 million contacts across 42 million companies.

faqs.question: Is Saleshandy SOC 2 compliant?
faqs.answer: Yes, along with ISO 27001 and GDPR compliance.

use_cases.title: Cold email outreach
use_cases.description: Automate SPF/DKIM/DMARC setup and run email sequences.

use_cases.title: Lead sourcing
use_cases.description: Pull leads from an 852M+ contact database with buying signals.

use_cases.title: Multichannel prospecting
use_cases.description: Combine email, calls, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp in one sequence.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Saleshandy?
paragraphs: Saleshandy is an all-in-one cold outreach platform that combines an 852M+ contact database, automated email infrastructure setup, and multichannel sequences spanning email, calls, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp.
A deliverability suite with warmup and inbox placement testing, plus a unified inbox and built-in CRM, round out the outreach-to-close workflow.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Saleshandy is for
paragraphs: Saleshandy is aimed at sales teams, SDRs, lead generation agencies, founders, solopreneurs, and recruiters who need lead data and multichannel outreach in one platform.

enrichment.short_description: Mailshake is a sales engagement platform for cold email, phone, and social outreach with an AI email writer and lead data finder.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Mailshake is a sales engagement platform combining an AI email writer, lead data finder, and multichannel cold outreach for sales teams.

features.title: Data Finder
features.description: Prospect identification by role, location, and company.

features.title: SHAKEspeare AI Email Writer
features.description: Auto-generates email copy for outreach campaigns.

features.title: Email deliverability tools
features.description: Domain setup, warm-up, and list cleaning.

features.title: Lead Catcher
features.description: Identifies engaged prospects for follow-up.

features.title: Mail Merge
features.description: Personalized bulk sending with automated follow-ups.

features.title: Multi-channel dialer
features.description: Phone dialer integrated with email outreach on higher tiers.

pros: Trusted by 100,000+ companies per the site
Combines email, phone dialer, and social outreach in one platform
Integrates with major CRMs (Salesforce, Pipedrive, HubSpot) and email providers
Includes AI email writing (SHAKEspeare) on all paid tiers
cons: No free plan or free trial — payment is required upfront
Phone dialer and 5 phone numbers are limited to the higher Sales Engagement tier
Agency-level pricing requires contacting sales rather than transparent self-serve pricing

faqs.question: Does Mailshake have a free trial?
faqs.answer: No, all plans require payment upfront; there's no free plan or trial.

faqs.question: What's the cheapest Mailshake plan?
faqs.answer: Starter, at $29/month ($25/month billed yearly).

faqs.question: Does Mailshake include an AI writer?
faqs.answer: Yes, the SHAKEspeare AI Email Writer is included on paid plans.

faqs.question: What CRMs does Mailshake integrate with?
faqs.answer: Salesforce, Pipedrive, and HubSpot, among others.

use_cases.title: Cold email campaigns
use_cases.description: Run mail merge sequences with automated follow-ups.

use_cases.title: Multichannel outreach
use_cases.description: Combine email with a phone dialer and social outreach.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted email writing
use_cases.description: Use SHAKEspeare to generate outreach copy.

features: Mail merge, A/B testing, AI email writing
Unlimited dialer minutes to North America

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Mailshake?
paragraphs: Mailshake is a sales engagement platform for cold outreach across email, phone, and social channels, built around an AI email writer and a lead data finder for prospecting.
Deliverability tools such as warm-up and list cleaning, plus mail merge and automated follow-ups, support outbound campaigns from setup through to reply tracking.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Mailshake is for
paragraphs: Mailshake serves sales leaders, sales reps and SDRs, agency owners, and marketers who run cold outreach campaigns and want AI-assisted copywriting alongside CRM integrations.

enrichment.short_description: Klenty is an AI sales engagement platform combining multichannel outreach, a parallel dialer, and agentic cadences for outbound teams.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Klenty is an AI sales engagement platform with multichannel outreach, a parallel dialer, and agentic cadences for outbound sales teams.

features.title: Multi-channel outreach
features.description: Email, calls, SMS, and 5+ channels unified in one platform.

features.title: Parallel Dialer
features.description: Executes up to 350 calls per hour with AI-powered voicemail/IVR detection.

features.title: Agentic cadences
features.description: AI-driven cadences that research accounts and personalize outreach.

features.title: AI account research
features.description: Analysis across 150+ data sources for tailored value propositions.

features.title: Email deliverability suite
features.description: Protects sender reputation and inbox placement.

features.title: AI call coaching
features.description: Performance analysis and rep development tools.

pros: Combines multichannel outreach with a high-volume parallel dialer
Integrates with Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zoho, and MS Dynamics
Used by 5,000+ sales teams per the site
14-day free trial with full feature access and no credit card required
cons: No permanent free plan
Parallel & Power Dialer is a $45/user/month add-on, not included by default
Account-based selling features are limited to the priciest Plus plan

faqs.question: Does Klenty have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, but it offers a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What's the cheapest Klenty plan?
faqs.answer: Starter, at $50/month billed annually.

faqs.question: Is the dialer included in all plans?
faqs.answer: No, the Parallel & Power Dialer is a $45/user/month add-on.

faqs.question: What CRMs does Klenty integrate with?
faqs.answer: Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zoho, and MS Dynamics.

use_cases.title: High-volume calling
use_cases.description: Use the Parallel Dialer for up to 350 calls per hour.

use_cases.title: Multichannel prospecting
use_cases.description: Run email, calls, and SMS in unified sequences.

use_cases.title: Account-based selling
use_cases.description: Use AI account research across 150+ data sources.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Klenty?
paragraphs: Klenty is an AI sales engagement platform that unifies email, calling, and SMS outreach with a high-volume parallel dialer and AI-driven cadences that research accounts before outreach.
It also offers call coaching and voicemail/IVR detection to help outbound teams improve rep performance alongside their sequences.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Klenty is for
paragraphs: Klenty is built for fast-growing outbound sales teams and SDR teams that rely on high call volumes and multichannel sequencing, including account-based selling programs on its higher-tier plan.

enrichment.short_description: Outplay is a sales engagement platform for growing SMBs with multichannel outreach, a dialer, and a free-forever plan for small teams.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Outplay is a sales engagement platform for growing SMBs with multichannel outreach, a dialer, and a free-forever plan for small teams.

features.title: Multi-channel outreach
features.description: Email, phone, SMS, WhatsApp, video, and website chat in one workflow.

features.title: Automated LinkedIn outreach
features.description: Automated LinkedIn touches alongside email campaigns.

features.title: Sales automation
features.description: Multichannel sequences with action-based triggers.

features.title: Lead generation tools
features.description: Chrome extension and inbound lead capture from website forms.

features.title: Revenue intelligence
features.description: Sales analytics, top-sequence reports, and leaderboards.

features.title: Custom AI sales agent
features.description: Automates account research for reps.

pros: Includes a genuine Free Forever plan for smaller prospect volumes
Priced for growing SMBs rather than enterprise-only buyers
Free enterprise-level customer support included across plans
7-day free trial on paid tiers with no credit card required
cons: Free Forever plan is capped at 2,000 active prospects/month and 2 mailboxes
Advanced features (Slack integration, SSO, power dialer) are limited to the top Enterprise tier
Email warm-up, AI SDR, and extra mailboxes are paid add-ons rather than included

faqs.question: Does Outplay have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a Free Forever plan supporting 2,000 active prospects/month.

faqs.question: What's the cheapest paid Outplay plan?
faqs.answer: Starter, at $39/month billed annually.

faqs.question: Does Outplay support LinkedIn outreach?
faqs.answer: Yes, automated LinkedIn outreach is included.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 7-day free trial with no credit card required.

use_cases.title: Cost-effective sales engagement
use_cases.description: Use the Free Forever plan for early-stage outbound.

use_cases.title: Multichannel outbound
use_cases.description: Combine email, phone, SMS, and LinkedIn in one sequence.

use_cases.title: Account research automation
use_cases.description: Use the custom AI sales agent to research target accounts.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Outplay?
paragraphs: Outplay is a sales engagement platform offering multichannel outreach across email, phone, SMS, WhatsApp, video, and website chat, along with a dialer and a custom AI sales agent for account research.
It's positioned as a lower-cost alternative to enterprise tools like Salesloft and Outreach, with a genuine free-forever tier for smaller prospect volumes.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Outplay is for
paragraphs: Outplay targets growing SMB sales teams that want multichannel sequencing and a dialer without enterprise-only pricing, from small teams on the free plan up to agencies on higher tiers.
